results.title: BC Nurses Union holds rally outside Kelowna General Hospital (Kelowna)
results.description: If the honks and waves of people driving by are any indication, the BC Nurses Union has the public firmly behind them in their labour dispute with Health Employers Association. ​Union president Adriane Gear was in Kelowna to rally the troops on Monday afternoon. results.title: Mercado-Fortine announces City Council run
results.description: News release Santa Clarita native Gloria Mercado‐Fortine, has announced her intention to run for the Santa Clarita City Council District 2 seat in the upcoming November election, according to a news release from [...] The post Mercado-Fortine announces City Council run appeared first on Santa Clarita Valley Signal .

results.title: 70 detained, 118 cops and 60 marchers Injured: Police block protesters' march to Parliament; JP Nadda meets CJP representatives
results.description: A protest by the Cockroach Janta Party demanding a minister's resignation turned chaotic. Protesters clashed with police, resulting in numerous injuries on both sides. Police reported detentions and filed charges related to rioting and assault on public servants. The BJP blamed Left-affiliated student groups for instigating the organized violence. Investigations are underway to establish criminal responsibility for the disturbances.
